# scalegrid_database_versions (Data Source)

Returns the database engine versions available for a given engine and cloud provider.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cloud_provider` (String) Cloud provider: `AWS`, `AZURE`, `DO`, or `GCP`.
- `database` (String) Database engine: `mongodb`, `redis`, `mysql`, or `postgresql`.

### Read-Only

- `versions` (List of String) List of supported version identifiers (e.g. `V366`, `v8020`).
